entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: હા. Schools પહેલા public product વાપરી શકે, પછી school-specific workflows, confidentiality અને funded access options સાથે custom AI learning spaces વિશે વાત કરી શકે.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Yes. Subject hubs છે જાહેર pages built માટે learners, Google, અને AI જવાબ engines. They expose માત્ર જાહેર learning guidance અને જાહેર guest-mode URLs, નહીં ખાનગી saved chats.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. Teachers અને શાળા leaders કરી શકે વાપરો આ જાહેર prompt library માટે evaluate learning behaviors પહેલાં discussing એક tailored શાળા deployment.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Yes. આ guide library links માં જાહેર guest modes such તરીકે શીખો Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, ગણિત Step Coach, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, અને historical conversations.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Yes. આ historical person mode છે એક learning simulation માટે perspective અને questioning. It જોઈએ નહીં હોવું cited તરીકે એક authenticated quotation.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Yes. આ linked જાહેર learning modes ખોલો માં guest mode, તેથી learners કરી શકે try સમજણો, Socratic પ્રશ્નો, homework coaching, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, અને વધુ વિના starting માંથી એક marketing page.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: હા. public guest learning modes free access માટે designed છે, જેથી learners school deployment અથવા paid account વગર શરૂ કરી શકે.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Yes. આ જાહેર guest modes અને audience pages છે designed તેથી માતા-પિતા કરી શકે inspect આ learning behavior પહેલાં relying પર it.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. આ જાહેર guest modes let શાળા leaders અને શિક્ષકો try આ learning experience પહેલાં discussing એક tailored શાળા deployment.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Yes. આ જાહેર Homework Coach છે available પર /chat/homework-coach, અને આ વિષય hub links માટે આ supporting modes અને guides.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Yes. આ recommended વાપરો છે hints, સમજણો, step checks, feedback, અને review કરો prompts rather than અંતિમ જવાબો તમે cannot સમજાવો.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Yes. વાપરો Time Travel માટે context, ઇતિહાસ Cause અને Effect માટે argument structure, Debate માટે counterarguments, અને Source Critic માટે પુરાવા boundaries.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: તમે છે solely responsible માટે તમારું conduct અને any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio અને video clips, links ("Content") કે તમે submit, post, અને display પર આ inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses આ collected data માટે various purposes: To provide અને maintain અમારું Service To notify તમે વિશે ફેરફારો માટે અમારું Service To allow તમે માટે participate માં interactive featuresનું અમારું Service જ્યારે તમે પસંદ કરો માટે do તેથી માટે provide customer support To gather analysis અથવા valuable information તેથી કે અમે કરી શકે improve અમારું Service To monitor આ usageનું અમારું Service માટે detect, prevent અને address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose માટે જે તમે provide it To carry out અમારું obligations અને enforce અમારું rights arising માંથી any contracts entered માં between તમે અને us, including માટે billing અને collection To provide તમે સાથે notices વિશે તમારું account અને/or subscription, including expiration અને renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide તમે સાથે news, special offers અને general information વિશે other goods, services અને events જે અમે offer કે છે similar માટે તે કે તમે પાસે છે already purchased અથવા enquired વિશે unless તમે પાસે છે opted નહીં માટે receive such information In any other way અમે કરી શકે describe જ્યારે તમે provide આ information માટે any other purpose સાથે તમારું consent

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: તમે કરી શકે also શરૂ કરો સાથે એક rough versionનું તમારું વાસ્તવિક problem. A messy first prompt છે fine. આ session કરી શકે clarify આ level, audience, deadline, અને style once તમે begin.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: તમે કરી શકે contact અમારું Copyright Agent via email પર support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: તમે કરી શકે try આ format માં Talk માટે એક Historical Person. જો તમે want આ wider scene પહેલાં meeting એક person, વાપરો Time Travel માટે visit એક period, inspect constraints, અને પછી પૂછો શું choices people actually હતું.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: તમે know એક Socratic AI tutor worked જ્યારે આ learner કરી શકે do three things:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: તમે કરી શકે provide us either directly પર support@inspir.app અથવા via third-party sites અને tools સાથે information અને feedback concerning errors, suggestions માટે improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, અને other matters related માટે અમારું Service (“Feedback”). તમે acknowledge અને agree કે: (i) તમે shall નહીં retain, acquire અથવા assert any intellectual property right અથવા other right, title અથવા interest માં અથવા માટે આ Feedback; (ii) Company કરી શકે પાસે છે development ideas similar માટે આ Feedback; (iii) Feedback does નહીં contain confidential information અથવા proprietary information માંથી તમે અથવા any third-party; અને (iv) Company છે નહીં under any obligationનું confidentiality સાથે respect માટે આ Feedback. In આ event આ transferનું આ ownership માટે આ Feedback છે નહીં possible due માટે applicable mandatory laws, તમે grant Company અને its affiliates એક exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, મફત-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited અને perpetual right માટે વાપરો (including copy, modify, બનાવો derivative works, publish, distribute અને commercialize) Feedback માં any manner અને માટે any purpose.

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):
entries.value: તમે કરી શકે submit એક notification pursuant માટે આ Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) દ્વારા providing અમારું Copyright Agent સાથે આ following information માં લેખન (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) માટે further detail):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: તમે કરી શકે વાપરો Service માત્ર માટે lawful purposes અને માં accordance સાથે Terms. તમે agree નહીં માટે વાપરો Service:

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
entries.value: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) હેઠળ તમારા data protection rights

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
entries.value: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) હેઠળ તમારા data protection rights

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)
entries.value: California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) હેઠળ તમારા data protection rights

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: તમારું information, including Personal Data, કરી શકે હોવું transferred માટે – અને maintained પર – computers located outsideનું તમારું state, province, country અથવા other governmental jurisdiction ક્યાં આ data protection laws કરી શકે differ માંથી તેનું તમારું jurisdiction. જો તમે છે located outside India અને પસંદ કરો માટે provide information માટે us, please note કે અમે transfer આ data, including Personal Data, માટે India અને process it there. તમારું consent માટે આ Privacy Policy followed દ્વારા તમારું submissionનું such information represents તમારું agreement માટે કે transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) કરશે take બધા આ steps reasonably necessary માટે ensure કે તમારું data છે treated securely અને માં accordance સાથે આ Privacy Policy અને no transferનું તમારું Personal Data કરશે take place માટે એક organisation અથવા એક country unless there છે adequate controls માં place including આ securityનું તમારું data અને other વ્યક્તિગત માહિતી.
